name: pr_cep_expwin_atlo
drl: rule R when $a : A($ac : acct) $b : B(acct == $ac, this after[10000ms,20000ms] $a) then end
_finding: expires == window lo, partner at EXACTLY that instant (delta == lo == expires == 10000): the anchor is still alive AT its deadline and the join FIRES. This is the single surviving instant of a window whose lo equals the lifetime - tier 2 truncation, NOT tier-1 never-match (external review round 9: the authoring lint's tier frontier was <= where the engine/oracle boundary is <).
